title: High-density mixed content
description: Text + numbers + symbols + dates — maximum density at speed
text: On 2026-05-15, the team closed 47 issues, opened 12 new ones, and merged 23 pull requests (totaling +4,820 / -2,100 lines). Average review time: 3.5 hours. Test coverage rose to 87%. Tag v2.4.0 shipped at 17:42 UTC. Next milestone: v2.5 by 2026-06-30.
tips: Engineers and analysts type this kind of text all day
Numbers/dates should flow at the same speed as words by now
If 74 WPM here is hard, drop to 65 and rebuild rhythm

character_tips.anna: Dense data text is real engineering speed. Words and digits = same rhythm.
character_tips.maxim: Real ops writing. Numbers and text at one pace = pro level.
character_tips.knopych: DATA OVERLOAD! 💾 Numbers, dates, symbols — ALL THE THINGS!
character_tips.klavochka: Every kind of character at home, my sunshine 🌞
